data.title: Binance: Alpha users with at least 160 points can claim 900 ESPORTS airdrops
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Yooldo Games (ESPORTS) trading on Binance Alpha will start at 17:00 (UTC+8) on July 19, 2025. After the trading starts, users with at least 160 Alpha points can apply for 900 ESPORTS token airdrops. First come, first served, until the airdrop pool is full or the event ends. Applying for an airdrop will consume 15 Alpha points. Users must confirm the claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page, otherwise it will be deemed to have given up the airdrop.

data.title: Bitcoin Eyes Quantum-Resistant Future as Exchange Reserves Fall Shy of 5-Year Low

data.title: Xinhua News Agency commented on the US "Genius Act": The credibility and international responsibility of the US dollar will affect global acceptance, and simply changing the form is not enough to consolidate the influence of the US dollar and stablecoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Trump officially signed the "Guide and Establishment of the United States Stablecoin National Innovation Act" (referred to as the "Genius Act") at the White House, marking the first time that the United States has established a regulatory framework for stablecoins. Trump said that stablecoins will help increase demand for U.S. Treasuries, lower interest rates, and consolidate the dollar's position as a global reserve currency. He reiterated that "central bank digital currency will never be allowed to be established in the United States." The "Genius Act" requires stablecoins to be supported by liquid assets such as the U.S. dollar or U.S. short-term Treasury bonds, and issuers must disclose reserve details every month. Currently, the world's two largest stablecoins, USDT and USDC, account for nearly 90% of the total market value. According to statistics, the stablecoin market size is about US$247 billion, and U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant expects it to grow to US$3.7 trillion by 2030. Experts pointed out that the United States is pushing for stablecoins in order to take advantage of the existing advantages of the U.S. dollar and maintain its dominant position in the global currency and payment system. Some believe that this move may ease the pressure on U.S. debt. However, some Democratic lawmakers questioned that the bill failed to provide sufficient consumer and financial stability protection, and pointed out that the Trump family has a connection with cryptocurrencies. Some Republican lawmakers also believe that the bill conflicts with Trump's previous executive order banning central bank digital currencies. (CCTV News)

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $363 million yesterday, continuing a net inflow for 12 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (July 18, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 363 million US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of 497 million US dollars in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached 56.974 billion US dollars.
The second is WisdomTree ETF BTCW, with a net inflow of 3.1143 million US dollars in a single day, and the total net inflow of BTCW has reached 40.6395 million US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale ETF GBTC, with a net outflow of 81.2873 million US dollars in a single day, and the total net outflow of GBTC has reached 23.506 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF is US$152.398 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 6.51%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$54.751 billion.
